app.script:
df <- subset(get.input(), !is.na(time_s))
df$position_mean_m <- rowMeans(df[c("position_1_m", "position_2_m", "position_3_m")], na.rm = TRUE)
df$position_sd_m <- apply(df[c("position_1_m", "position_2_m", "position_3_m")], 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
set.paper_style(mar = c(4.2, 4.2, 2.1, 0.8))
fit <- lm(position_mean_m ~ time_s + I(time_s^2), data = df)
time_grid <- seq(min(df$time_s), max(df$time_s), length.out = 200)
plot(df$time_s, df$position_mean_m,
  pch = 19, col = "#1f77b4", cex = 1.15,
  xlab = "Time / s", ylab = "Position / m",
  main = "Position-time graph"
)
add.paper_guides(show_top_axis = TRUE)
arrows(df$time_s, df$position_mean_m - df$position_sd_m,
  df$time_s, df$position_mean_m + df$position_sd_m,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.04
)
lines(time_grid, predict(fit, newdata = data.frame(time_s = time_grid)), col = "#374151", lwd = 2)
print(df[c("time_s", "position_mean_m", "position_sd_m")])
summary(fit)
